must_detect.matched_text:
PROJECT LUMEN — Term Sheet for €40,000,000 Green Convertible Notes and Call Option; issuer: Aurora Lumen S.A.; investor: Bluegrain Ventures S.à r.l.; governed by laws of an EU Member State.
Admission & MAR: notes intended for admission to trading on the Alpine City Exchange (EU regulated market); until publication of an approved prospectus, this document contains inside information under EU MAR and must be treated as confidential.
Use of Proceeds & CSRD/SFDR: proceeds to fund Helios‑X product line and CSRD reporting systems; SFDR classification targeted Article 8; genetic algorithm risk models may be used for impact KPIs (benign use of “genetic”).
Key Person Disclosure (GDPR Art 9): Dr. Selene Marković (Chief Biosignals Officer, ID code NL—A L X— 9 0 1) has an epilepsy diagnosis and is enrolled in fingerprint/iris biometric access control; explicit consent recorded on 2026‑02‑14, access strictly role‑based.
Additional Special‑Category Data: Dr. Marković is a dues‑paying member of the Neurotech Workers Union and observes Eastern Orthodox religious practices; processing limited to employment, insurance, and investor due diligence with safeguards.
Cross‑Border Transfer: limited HR and due‑diligence records (including the above special categories) may be transferred to processors in Novaland (non‑EEA) under 2021 SCCs and supplementary measures; sub‑processors listed at https://data.aurora‑lumen.eu/dp‑list?v=2.
Acquisition Option: investor granted an 18‑month call to acquire up to 51% of Aurora Lumen S.A. at €3.40 per share (internal code ALUM‑EQ‑X), subject to regulatory approvals by the competent authority and no prohibition by any EU competition body.
Negative MAC language: a Material Adverse Change shall not be deemed to have occurred due to changes in accounting standards, general market downturns, or the Rivermouth Falcons losing the Coastal League; sponsor rotation is not a MAC.
Sustainability Covenants: issuer to publish CSRD‑compliant sustainability statements and SFDR PAI indicators; generic DEI policy (Open Doors Inclusion Charter) to remain in effect without creating any representation about sexual orientation of any individual.
Data Minimisation & Retention: sensitive records for Dr. Selene Marković will be pseudonymised and retained 3 years post‑closing; data subjects may contact dataprivacy@aurora‑lumen.eu or +358 555 0199 for rights requests.
Public‑Source References: non‑confidential metrics may include extracts from GreenIndex Europa and the City of Northbridge climate portal; quoting such public sources alone does not constitute Inside Information.
Covenants & Leverage: leverage cap 2.5x EBITDA; coupon 4.25% PIK with step‑up on ESG KPI miss; no dividends without consent; this is not a silver bullet and standard carve‑outs apply.
Confidentiality & Rooms: documents hosted at https://rooms.aurora‑lumen.eu/txn/PL‑2026?f=ts%2Fv3#art9 may include redacted special‑category annexes; do not export outside the EU drive without DPO sign‑off.
Contacts & Notices: Ms. Hana Varela (VP Corporate Development) — hana.varela@aurora‑lumen.eu; investor relations — ir@bluegrain‑ventures.eu; registered office: 12 Quai des Lanternes, 1040 Granstadt, EU.
Operational note (lowercase pmo): file the draft into sprint board ‘financing‑lumen’: backlog -> diligence -> mar‑comms; product names in scope: Helios‑X, Lumen Arc, and MeadowSpark.
